items.title: A tasty RPG that will make you very hungry
items.description: Roleplaying games are often defined by excess. items.title: Are you filthy enough for a $700 portable shower?
items.description: A luxurious hot shower anywhere you go. Hot showers, like electricity, are a luxury that's easy to take for granted.
